paper.title: Automatic Security Evaluation and (Related-key) Differential Characteristic Search: Application to SIMON, PRESENT, LBlock, DES(L) and Other Bit-oriented Block Ciphers

target.claim: Need the 24-round related-key differential upper-bound claim, not only the small validated checkpoints.

notes: Current-lane extension example: should route to needs-calibration rather than unsupported-current-scope.
